meaning_english: An unattainable or fanciful hope or plan.

word: To show a clean pair of heels

To avoid being too friendly or close to someone.
To reveal a secret carelessly or by mistake.

To praise one's own achievements.
To leave someone in a difficult situation without help.

word: To hit the nail on the head

word: To keep the wolf from the door

An unexpected winner.
To avoid making a decision or taking a side.
To ignore what someone says.

To admit defeat.
To be extremely happy.

meaning_english: Something that seems bad at first but results in something good.
